item.title: Northwestern 小脑启发芯片的目标是将代理异常检测效率提高 10,000 倍
item.summary: Northwestern University researchers published a Nature Communications paper describing a cerebellum-inspired memtransistor that reportedly achieves 10,000x fewer computational operations for anomaly detection than conventional AI, a potential breakthrough for always-on edge agents in healthcare, robotics, and cybersecu
